basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Research Associate and Senior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 08-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Research Associate (RA): Max 45 years; Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Max 40 years. Relaxation as per GoI/ICAR rules.
age_limit.details: Research Associate (RA): Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is 5 years, for OBC is 3 years, and for PwD is 10 years. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST is 5 years, for OBC is 3 years, and for PwD is 10 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences OR Master degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree OR Master's degree in Agronomy with 4 years / 5 years of Bachelor's degree.
qualification.details: Research Associate (RA): Ph.D. degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences. OR Master degree in Agricultural Physics/Agricultural Engineering/Agricultural Meteorology/Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & Environmental Sciences with 4/5 years of Bachelor's degree having 1st division or 60% marks or equivalent overall grade point average, with at least three years of research experience as evidenced from Fellowship/Associateship/Training/ other engagements as circulated vide F. No. 2-9/2012-HRD dated 25.04.2014 and one research paper in Science Citation Index (SCI)/ NAAS rated (≥4.0) Journal as per OM SR/S9/Z-09/2018 of DST dated 30.01.2019. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Master's degree in Agronomy with 4 years / 5 years of Bachelor's degree. Candidates having Post-graduate degree in Basic Sciences with 3 years Bachelor's degree and 2 years Master's degree should have NET qualifications and 2 years of research experience as mentioned in OM No. Edn.6/27/2014/HRD dated 13th July, 2015, OM No. Agril. Edn. 6/27/2014-HRD 9th October, 2015 of the Council and OM SR/S9/Z-09/2018 of DST dated 30th January, 2019.

salary_details.details: Research Associate (RA): ₹ 61,000 per Month + HRA (for Master Degree holders) & ₹ 67,000 per Month + HRA (for Ph.D. Degree holders). Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA for 1st and 2nd year & Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA for 3rd year onwards.

selection_process: educational performance and/or relevant research experience. Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
